site.title: Acme | Digital product studio
site.description: Acme is a digital product studio. We help teams design, build, and ship web and mobile products that people love to use.

hero.title: We design and build products people love
hero.subtitle: From first sketch to production launch, a senior team partners with you to ship web and mobile products that move your business forward.

trustBar.text: Trusted by teams building the future · San Francisco · New York · Remote

whoWeAre.title: A small team that ships big ideas
whoWeAre.body: We are a product studio that blends strategy, design, and engineering under one roof. Fewer handoffs, faster decisions, and work we are proud to put our name on.

bullets.title: Senior team
bullets.desc: You work directly with the people doing the work, not a layer of account managers.

bullets.title: Fast iteration
bullets.desc: We ship in small slices so you see real progress every week.

bullets.title: Transparent process
bullets.desc: Clear scope, clear pricing, and a roadmap you can actually follow.

bullets.title: Modern stack
bullets.desc: We build on proven, current tools so your product is fast and easy to maintain.

bullets.title: Built to last
bullets.desc: Clean handoff and documentation so your team can run with it.

services.title: Services we offer
services.subtitle: Everything you need to take a product from idea to launch, and to keep it growing.

strategy.title: Product strategy
strategy.tagline: Find the shortest path to a product worth building.
strategy.description: Workshops, research, and a clear roadmap. We help you decide what to build first and why, so every sprint moves the needle.

design.title: Design
design.tagline: Interfaces that are a pleasure to use.
design.description: Brand, UX, and polished UI. We design systems, not just screens, so your product stays consistent as it grows.

engineering.title: Engineering
engineering.description: Full-stack web and mobile development on a modern stack, with the testing and tooling to keep it healthy.

support.title: Care and growth
support.description: Ongoing improvements, monitoring, and support, so your product keeps getting better and never goes stale.

stats.title: By the numbers
stats.subtitle: Almost a decade of shipping products with teams of every size.

why.title: Why teams choose us
why.subtitle: The reasons clients come back and send their friends.

items.title: One team, end to end
items.desc: Strategy, design, and engineering in one room means fewer handoffs and faster, better decisions.

items.title: Senior by default
items.desc: Every project is staffed with experienced people who have shipped real products before.

items.title: No surprises
items.desc: Clear scope and transparent pricing, with weekly demos so you always know where things stand.

about.title: Hello, we are Acme
about.intro: Acme is a digital product studio founded on a simple idea: small, senior teams build better products than big, layered ones. For nearly a decade we have partnered with startups and established companies to design, build, and grow software people actually enjoy using.

whyChoose.title: Senior team
whyChoose.desc: You get experienced makers, not a rotating cast of juniors.

whyChoose.title: Real partnership
whyChoose.desc: We treat your goals as our own and stay invested past launch.

whyChoose.title: Speed with care
whyChoose.desc: We move quickly without cutting the corners that matter.

whyChoose.title: Fair, clear pricing
whyChoose.desc: Transparent scope and budgets, with no hidden surprises.

contact.title: Have a project in mind?
contact.subtitle: Tell us what you are building and we will get back to you within a day.

form.name: Name
form.success: Thanks! We will get back to you within a day.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

footer.tagline: A digital product studio helping teams design, build, and ship software people love.

blog.subtitle: Notes on product, design, and engineering from the Acme team.
